comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Feature: Apps and tools commands
  Scenario: Application command passthrough
    Given a Pixoo at IP "192.168.0.37"
    And I connect
    When I send raw command "App/SomeCommand" with payload
    Then the last command should be "App/SomeCommand"

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Closing as obsolete per user request during board cleanup.
